changes_made: Renamed k8s_cluster_state_backup_scheduled to k8s_etcd_cluster_state_backup_scheduled for consistency with resource naming
review_notes: The control CP-9-c is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves backing up critical components like etcd and audit logs. The function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but one needed adjustment for consistency. The functions are technically accurate and map well to Kubernetes security practices.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource names are consistent with valid resources, such as using 'etcd' for cluster state backups.
title: System Backup - Conduct backups of system documentation,...
step1_reasoning: The control CP-9-c focuses on conducting backups of system documentation, which in a Kubernetes context can be interpreted as ensuring that critical components such as etcd (which stores cluster state) and audit logs are backed up. Additionally, scheduling regular backups of the entire cluster state, including configurations and metadata, aligns with the intent of this control.
